title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: A YouTube guide demonstrating eight practical workflows using Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model, including multimodal vision analysis, video understanding, contract analysis, code generation, and workspace automation. The presenter claims Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers performance comparable to the Pro tier at lower cost.
